name: V_rest sweep on t0024 DSGC channel testbed (stochastic AR(2) release)
short_description: Per-trial spike counts and peak voltages from a V_rest sweep (-90 to -20 mV in 10 mV steps) of the t0024 DSGC compartmental model under the standard 12-angle moving-bar protocol with AR(2)-correlated stochastic E-I release at rho=0.6 (10 trials per angle per V_rest, 960 trials total).
model_description: de Rosenroll 2026 DSGC compartmental model ported in t0024 (library asset de_rosenroll_2026_dsgc). The model uses HHst membrane (with leak reversal eleak_HHst) on the soma and pas membrane (with e_pas) on dendrites, plus per-dendrite AR(2)-correlated stochastic glutamate/GABA release with a default temporal correlation rho=0.6 between successive synaptic events. The V_rest is shifted by overriding both h.v_init and the resting parameters of every HHst- and pas-bearing section before h.finitialize.
prediction_schema: Each row is one (V_rest, angle, trial) outcome. Columns: v_rest_mv (float, mV), trial (int, zero-based trial index per angle, 0..9 for this stochastic sweep), direction_deg (int, motion direction in degrees, one of 0/30/60/90/120/150/180/210/240/270/300/330), spike_count (int, count of spikes during the simulation window), peak_mv (float, peak somatic membrane voltage in mV), firing_rate_hz (float, spike_count / 1.0 s simulation window).

files.description: Tidy CSV of per-trial outcomes for the 8 V_rest values x 12 directions x 10 trials = 960 trials.
